description:
Goal
Move destination lowering, invariant checking, extern marshal resolution, and planned-program materialization out of the top-level codegen driver sequence and make Compiler the caller that drives those stages.

Signal
- The top-level native pipeline order lives in Compiler.
- Codegen consumes a prepared native package instead of raw `Module + ModulePlan` at the outermost seam.
- Existing authoritative-plan telemetry and tests still pass.

Strategy
- Introduce a prepared-native boundary that carries the plan-preserving transform outputs codegen needs.
- Keep backend-specific CLIF emission in `ir_codegen`.
- Preserve the one-authoritative-plan rule documented in `.agent/docs/single-authoritative-plan.md`.
title: Compiler spine: extract native preflight from codegen driver
